name: Diabetic Strawberry Jam
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Concentrated white grape juice (simmered down from 1-1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place berry juices and lemon rind in a saucepan.
2. Mash berries slightly to release juice.
3. Heat mixture to boiling, stirring occasionally until the gelatin is dissolved.
4. Remove from heat and skim any foam that forms on top.
5. Pour into hot jars with hot lids.
6. Allow to cool to room temperature before storing.
Because this jam is stored in the freezer, you may use any airtight, leakproof freezer container for storage, even plastic containers. The flavor improves if allowed to sit at room temperature for a week and freezes beautifully for up to 6 months.
